# Avner Paes Gomes — Detailed bio and project descriptions

Last updated: 2026-05-13

## Bio

Avner Paes Gomes (also known as Avner Gomes) is a Senior Data Scientist and Forest Engineer based in Curitiba, Paraná, Brazil. He has 11+ years of experience bridging Forest Engineering and advanced analytics, architecting scalable Python and GIS data pipelines, machine-learning models, MLOps workflows, and business-intelligence systems for environmental analytics and MRV (Monitoring, Reporting, Verification). He has verified carbon credits across 100,000+ hectares and 29 KPIs for international clients in 8+ countries.

He is Top Rated on Upwork with 100% Job Success and 5.0/5.0 average rating across 14+ reviewed projects, serving clients in the United States, United Kingdom, Germany, Panama, Ecuador, Cambodia, France, and Brazil. He holds an MSc in Data Science from Nuclio Digital School (Barcelona, 2023), an MBA in Precision Forest Management from UFPR (Federal University of Paraná, 2018), and a B.Sc. in Forest Engineering from UFPR (2013). He is also Oxford-certified in English (C1 Advanced) and intermediate in Spanish (B1).

Since 2018 he has worked at IDR-Paraná (Instituto de Desenvolvimento Rural do Paraná, IAPAR/EMATER), the State Rural Development Institute of Paraná. Currently he is Technical Advisor for Geoprocessing in Area 4 (Information Management), coordinating data across 399 municipalities and 23 regional offices. He led the DataGeo Paraná ecosystem and built the state Gross Production Value (VBP) dashboard end-to-end. In parallel he runs an international freelance practice on Upwork.

His expertise covers Geographic Information Systems (GIS), PostGIS, Google Earth Engine, remote sensing (Sentinel-2, Landsat), LiDAR/DEM processing, Python data engineering, machine learning, MLOps, business intelligence (Power BI, Tableau, Looker Studio), digital marketing analytics (Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads), and forest and environmental analytics (MRV, EUDR compliance, carbon sequestration, deforestation monitoring, watershed modeling, SICAR / SIGEF / RESEX / CDRU land regularization).

## Current role

**Technical Advisor for Geoprocessing — IDR-Paraná (IAPAR/EMATER)**
Curitiba, Brazil. 2018 to present. Area 4 (Information Management) since 2024.

Coordinates the regional Geographic Information System, supporting institutional planning and cooperation terms with 399 municipalities and 23 regional offices. Built the Gross Production Value (VBP) dashboard for Paraná end-to-end: web scraping, ETL, Power BI. The dashboard is the reference tool for priority-chain selection and municipal cooperation terms. Led the DataGeo Paraná ecosystem of 9 interactive React dashboards with automated ETL pipelines, Google Apps Script analytics, and full SEO, reaching 50,000+ views. Elaborated forest restoration and carbon-credit feasibility studies, deforestation time-series monitoring, carbon-sequestration estimation, watershed modeling, and financial viability analysis. Designed training programs for farmers and internal staff.

## Selected freelance projects (Upwork, 2021–present)

### IoF — Internet of Forests (Panama / Amazon Basin, One Amazon Foundation + AECOM)
Designed and deployed a scalable geospatial ingestion pipeline (Python, Google Earth Engine, PostGIS) processing 200+ satellite layers into a hectare-grid MRV model with uncertainty quantification. Delivered 29 environmental KPIs across 6 thematic groups and verified carbon credits on 100,000+ hectares for EUDR compliance.

### Capital Certainty — RESEX Verde Para Sempre (Pará, Brazil)
Built a territorial intelligence package on a 1.3 million-hectare federal extractive reserve (RESEX Verde Para Sempre). Stack: Python, PostGIS, SICAR / SIGEF / TerraBrasilis / RESEX layers. Applied a vector-sanitation methodology to isolate community zones from conflict claims, supporting CDRU land regularization for traditional populations.

### Cityview — Urban Geocoding Pipeline (Dallas-Fort Worth, USA)
Implemented a production-grade urban geocoding pipeline in Python with multi-provider API fallback and quality scoring. Processed 100,000+ addresses and achieved 98%+ match accuracy, reducing location errors on messy real-world data.

### JW Hulme Co. — Market Share and CRM Analytics (USA)
Delivered Market Share and CRM analytics by CBSA for a US apparel brand (Python, SQL, Power BI). Mapped internal CRM data against external benchmarks to surface underserved metropolitan areas and reallocate marketing spend across the US apparel footprint.

### KOBE Interior Fabrics — International Sales BI Dashboard (UK and Germany)
Designed a Power BI + Python (GeoPandas) sales BI dashboard mapping 1,000+ postal areas with daily refresh and customer segmentation, adopted in weekly executive reviews by the international sales team.

### LiDAR Building Heights — Central London (UK, EPSG:27700)
Automated extraction of building heights from classified airborne LiDAR. Read classified .laz, split ground vs building returns, built a 1 m DTM via per-cell minimum Z with nearest-neighbor gap-fill, pulled OSM footprints reprojected to EPSG:27700, ran vectorised point-in-polygon over class-6 returns, and computed height as p95(roof Z) minus DTM(centroid). 27,338 buildings measured across 25 km² of Central London in under two minutes. Outputs: spreadsheet, GeoPackage, and HTML report.

### Orbify — WebGIS Platform Consulting (Cambodia / remote)
Ran end-to-end UX evaluation on a WebGIS platform of satellite indicators and delivered a prioritized backlog of UX and feature improvements, several shipped in the next product release.

### Deep Grain — Agricultural Land Assessment (Ecuador)
Investment-grade agricultural land assessment combining geotagged field surveys with Sentinel-2 and Landsat NDVI analysis to evaluate crop suitability and yield potential across Esmeraldas, Guayas, and El Oro provinces. Informed a multi-property land-acquisition decision.

### Flai Data — Multi-Channel Ads and Ticket Sales Analytics (USA / LATAM)
Built a Streamlit and Python multi-channel analytics platform unifying Google Ads, Meta Ads, and TikTok Ads with live ticket-sales feeds, FX normalization, and a ROAS / CPA / conversions-per-ticket KPI layer across 30+ cities. Cut campaign-setup time by approximately 70%.

### aDryada and others — Carbon and Forestry feasibility (Brazil)
Delivered forest-restoration and carbon-credit feasibility studies using multi-temporal Landsat / Sentinel-2 imagery, NDVI time series, biomass and tCO2e sequestration modelling. Produced quantitative go/no-go economic recommendations for each project area.

### Distance and Duration Matrix (multi-country)
Generated a 1.3 million-plus OSM route-pair distance and duration matrix using OSMnx with OpenRouteService fallback, error handling, and validated GeoPackage export.

### 3D Land-Development Visualization
LiDAR/DEM to STL 3D terrain pipeline with schematic and satellite map books for land-development clients.

## Internal / institutional projects

### DataGeo Paraná
Ecosystem of 9 interactive React dashboards on Paraná agriculture. Stack: React, Vite, D3.js, Recharts, Leaflet, Python (ETL), Google Apps Script, GitHub Actions. 50,000+ views. Hosted at datageoparana.github.io. Case study: https://avnergomes.github.io/portfolio/projects/datageo-parana.html

### Crédito Rural Paraná
First integrated public visualisation of rural credit flows in Paraná from BCB/SICOR data since 2013. Joins SICOR to municipal and regional boundaries; flows by program (PRONAF, PRONAMP, etc.), purpose (custeio, investimento, comercialização), and chain. Stack: React, BCB Olinda API, D3.js (Sankey, Treemap), Python. Case study: https://avnergomes.github.io/portfolio/projects/credito-rural-parana.html

### ComexStat Paraná
Consolidated view of Paraná foreign trade by production chain, mapping NCM commodity codes to a curated chain taxonomy. Sankey diagrams and time series of exports and imports from MDIC/ComexStat data. Stack: React, ComexStat API, D3.js, Python. Case study: https://avnergomes.github.io/portfolio/projects/comexstat-parana.html

### Emprego Agro Paraná
Monitoring surface for Paraná's agricultural labour market from CAGED data. CNAE classification by agribusiness chain, seasonality analysis, lollipop/bump charts and time series for harvest-cycle and year-on-year drift. Case study: https://avnergomes.github.io/portfolio/projects/emprego-agro-parana.html

### Censo Paraná
Demographic analysis of 399 Paraná municipalities from IBGE census data. Choropleth maps and comparative indicators for planning teams. Stack: React, IBGE API, D3.js, Leaflet, Python. Case study: https://avnergomes.github.io/portfolio/projects/censo-parana.html

### Preços de Terras — Paraná
Historical land price dashboard for Paraná built from DERAL public PDF releases. PDF parsing pipeline plus React dashboard with GeoJSON territorial filters and historical comparison. Case study: https://avnergomes.github.io/portfolio/projects/precos-de-terras.html

### Preços Florestais — Paraná
Forest product price monitoring for Paraná, consolidating and normalising scattered official compilations across years of shifting units and category names. Used by forestry consultants and timber buyers. Case study: https://avnergomes.github.io/portfolio/projects/precos-florestais.html

### Preços Diários
Dashboard of daily agricultural product prices from SEAB/DERAL with automated daily refresh via GitHub Actions. Time series, regional spread, and seasonality analysis. Case study: https://avnergomes.github.io/portfolio/projects/precos-diarios.html

### Água Segura — Water Management WebGIS
Interactive WebGIS coordinating multi-agency conservation across Paraná microbasins. Tracks intervention status from diagnosis through implementation; integrated with a Power BI dashboard for programme-wide metrics. Case study: https://avnergomes.github.io/portfolio/projects/agua-segura.html

### Des Arts — Wine Bar WebGIS (Lucca, Italy)
Investor due diligence WebGIS for a wine bar acquisition. Walking isochrones, competitor positioning, hotel-cluster density as proxy for tourist demand, all overlaid in an interactive Mapbox GL surface. Case study: https://avnergomes.github.io/portfolio/projects/des-arts-webgis.html

### Gross Production Value (VBP) Dashboard — Paraná
End-to-end pipeline (web scraping, ETL, Power BI) supporting the definition of priority production chains for institutional planning and drafting of cooperation terms with municipalities. Reference tool inside IDR-Paraná. Case study: https://avnergomes.github.io/portfolio/projects/vbp-parana.html

### Forest Development Plan
Multi-layer geospatial analysis to identify optimal areas for forest plantation implementation, considering implementation costs and price decline due to transportation costs. Stack: QGIS, spatial analysis, risk assessment.

## Skills (detailed)

### Programming and data
Python (pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, PyTorch, LightGBM, Prophet), R, SQL (PostgreSQL, BigQuery, SQLite, Supabase), Bash/Shell, Git/GitHub.

### Data engineering and pipelines
ETL/ELT, Airflow, dbt, Prefect, data modeling, data quality and monitoring, observability, data lakes/lakehouses, ingestion pipelines, web scraping (Playwright, BeautifulSoup, Selenium, Requests), data governance, CI/CD (GitHub Actions).

### Cloud and data platforms
Google Cloud (BigQuery, Earth Engine, Cloud Run), AWS (S3, EC2 fundamentals), Supabase, Snowflake (fundamentals), Redshift (fundamentals), Vercel, Docker.

### Machine learning, MLOps, analytics
Time-series forecasting (LSTM, Random Forest, ARIMA, Prophet), clustering (K-Means, HDBSCAN), regression, classification, feature engineering, experimental design, model deployment, MLOps fundamentals, statistical analysis.

### Business intelligence and visualization
Power BI (DAX, Power Query), Tableau, Looker Studio, React + D3.js / Recharts, Plotly, Streamlit, Excel (advanced), executive reporting, KPI design.

### Geospatial and remote sensing
QGIS, ArcGIS, Google Earth Engine, PostGIS, GeoPandas, Leaflet, OSMnx, Sentinel-2 / Landsat, LiDAR/DEM processing, NDVI and multi-temporal analysis, raster and vector analysis, WebGIS, geocoding pipelines, drone piloting.

### Forestry and environmental analytics
MRV for carbon and biodiversity, EUDR-aligned compliance pipelines, carbon sequestration and above-ground biomass estimation, deforestation monitoring, forest inventory, forest restoration feasibility, watershed modeling, ESG and Nature Positive Framework indicators, land regularization (SICAR / SIGEF / RESEX / CDRU).

### Digital marketing analytics
Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, GA4, CRM analytics, ROAS/CPA optimization, multi-channel attribution, conversion tracking.

- **B.Sc., Forest Engineering** — UFPR, 2013.
- **High School** — Colégio Militar de Curitiba, 2005.

## Availability

Full remote availability, flexible across US, EU, and LATAM time zones. Brazilian driver's license (category B). Certified drone pilot. Travel and overtime available. Open to full-time, contract, and freelance engagements.
